narrative: PRL clawed back most of yesterday's drop: volume-weighted price recovered to $0.7878 (+7.77% 24h) on $99.6k of cross-venue volume — only a touch above yesterday's thin tape. The real story is bridge flow: custody jumped +2.3% to 487,848 PRL and minted WPRL +2.4% to 484,857 (net +10.9k PRL deposits in 24h, the second biggest inbound day of the month), and supply/custody stayed in lockstep. Network hashrate climbed another +3.7% to 27.94 EH/s — a fresh chain high — while MinePRL's GPU count drifted 40 → 29, pulling pool share roughly in half to ~0.018%; the new capacity is landing elsewhere on the network. Code velocity steady (~80 commits/7d across the three tracked repos), and pearl-research-labs/pearl picked up another 7 stars to 171.

market.prl_circulating_supply_method: block_height × current_block_reward (constant-subsidy approximation — Pearl is in month 1, before the first halving)
sources: pool.mineprl.com/v1/public/summary (network.height, network.block_reward_prl for circulating supply approximation)

network.active_workers_scope: MinePRL pool only — network-wide miner count is not exposed by Pearl RPC

anomalies: PRL price +7.77% in 24h ($0.7329 → $0.7878), retracing most of yesterday's -13.66% drop on similar volume ($90k → $100k).
Bridge custody +10,929 PRL to 487,848 (+2.3%) — second biggest 24h inbound of the month; minted WPRL tracked in lockstep at +11,302.
MinePRL pool share dropped roughly in half (0.038% → 0.018%): pool GPUs 40 → 29 while network hashrate rose to 27.94 EH/s — new capacity is landing on other miners, not in the pool.
Block time eased to ~141s as new difficulty (0x18014333) absorbed the higher hashrate.

social.summary: No coordinated chatter overnight — @prlnet and @pearlbridgexyz quiet through the bounce, no incident discussion, no price-driven narrative pickup. Conversation volume around $PRL remains light.

github.last_commit_msg: RC5.35: Rabby first; drop named MetaMask entry to kill blank-screen bug
docs: tidy mirror references and audit attributions
fix(rpc): use chain.IsCurrent for getblocktemplate IBD check (#125)
